Title: Combat Basics
Description: Learn how to fight enemies and defend yourself in space combat.

Steps.Title: Introduction to Combat
Steps.Message: Space is dangerous! You'll encounter hostile ships and need to defend yourself. This tutorial will teach you the basics of combat.

Steps.Title: Weapons and Turrets
Steps.Message:
Your ship can be equipped with various weapon types:
• Chainguns - Fast, low damage
• Lasers - Energy weapons, good accuracy
• Cannons - Slow, high damage
• Missiles - Homing projectiles

Weapons are mounted on turret hardpoints on your ship.

Steps.Title: Targeting Enemies
Steps.Message:
To engage in combat:
1. Target an enemy ship using your radar
2. Get within weapon range
3. Fire your weapons (typically mouse or number keys)
4. Keep your target in sight

Your weapons will automatically track targets if equipped with turrets.

Steps.Title: Shields and Defense
Steps.Message:
Shields protect your ship from damage:
• Shields absorb damage before your hull takes hits
• Shields regenerate over time when not taking damage
• Shield capacity depends on shield generators on your ship
• Monitor your shield status in the HUD

Steps.Title: Combat Strategy
Steps.Message:
Combat tips:
• Keep moving to avoid enemy fire
• Use your shields strategically
• Target weapon systems to disable enemies
• Retreat if shields are low to regenerate
• Manage your power distribution between weapons, shields, and engines

Steps.Title: Destroy an Enemy
Steps.Message: Now try destroying an enemy ship! Use your weapons and the tactics you've learned. Good luck, Commander!

Steps.Title: Combat Complete!
Steps.Message: Excellent work! You've learned the basics of space combat. Continue practicing to become a formidable pilot!
